---
title: "Welcome To My Blog"
author: "NomadC"
date: "2025-08-02"
categories: [news]
---

Welcome! I'm a machine learning engineer focused on computer vision and efficient ML on edge devices.

This blog is where I document my learning journey — from Vision Transformers and ML compilation to day-to-day engineering with tools like Polars, PyTorch, and TFLite.

![](thumbnail.jpg)
